rationale: Educ. Code §21.047 governs centers for professional development of teachers; it has no fiscal or operational connection to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The board may develop the process for the establishment of centers for professional development through institutions of higher education for the purpose of integrating technology and innovative teaching practices in the preservice and staff development training of public school teachers and administrators.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
